TEXT.source: NTU Paiwan Data, Participant Nira, file 02SN107-4 Nira
TEXT.citation: Le Ferrand, √Č., Prud'hommeaux, E., Hartshorne, J. K., & Sung, L.-M. (2024). NTU Paiwan ASR Corpus. Electronic Resource.
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @electronic{leferrand2024ntu, author = {Le Ferrand, {'E}ric and Prud'hommeaux, Emily and Hartshorne, Joshua K. and Sung, Li-May}, year = {2024}, title = {{NTU} {Paiwan} {ASR} Corpus},type = {Electronic Resource}}

S.FORM: azua sika makaya a izua a patjetucu a kai, a kakudakudan, a palisi na paiwan zuku, mavan a izua pinui'inainaljan mavan a izua pinui'inaljanan a sinan kakudan tua 'iniladjan.
S.PHON: azua sika makaja a izua a pa ¶…ôtu ¶u a kai, a kakudakudan, a pa…≠isi na paiwan zuku, mavan a izua pinui Ēinaina éan mavan a izua pinui Ēina éanan a sinan kakudan tua Ēini…≠a…Čan.
S.FORM: azua sika makaya a izua a patjetucu a kai, a kakudakudan, a palisi na paiwan zuku, mavan a izua pinui'inainaljan mavan a izua pinui'inaljanan a sinan kakudan tua 'iniladjan.
S.PHON: azua sika makaja a izua a pa ¶…ôtu ¶u a kai, a kakudakudan, a pa…≠isi na paiwan zuku, mavan a izua pinui Ēinaina éan mavan a izua pinui Ēina éanan a sinan kakudan tua Ēini…≠a…Čan.

S.FORM: 'aw aicu a pinui'inaljanan a sinan kakudan tua 'inila'iladjan, kemasimaza taicu a matjatjalevalevak ta 'iladjan na vusam a kakudakudan.
S.PHON: Ēaw ai ¶u a pinui Ēina éanan a sinan kakudan tua Ēini…≠a Ēi…≠a…Čan, k…ômasimaza tai ¶u a ma ¶a ¶a…≠…ôva…≠…ôvak ta Ēi…≠a…Čan na vusam a kakudakudan.
S.FORM: 'aw aicu a pinui'inaljanan a sinan kakudan tua 'inila'iladjan, kemasimaza taicu a matjatjalevalevak ta 'iladjan na vusam a kakudakudan.
S.PHON: Ēaw ai ¶u a pinui Ēina éanan a sinan kakudan tua Ēini…≠a Ēi…≠a…Čan, k…ômasimaza tai ¶u a ma ¶a ¶a…≠…ôva…≠…ôvak ta Ēi…≠a…Čan na vusam a kakudakudan.

S.FORM: aicu a matjatjalevalevak ta 'iladjan na vusam a kakudakudan namayatucu, a na tja-sevalitan a 'iniladjan kata zaisang, sawzayan, mavan a sangasangasan a aljak a tjemalevak aya,
S.PHON: ai ¶u a ma ¶a ¶a…≠…ôva…≠…ôvak ta Ēi…≠a…Čan na vusam a kakudakudan namajatu ¶u, a na ¶a-s…ôva…≠itan a Ēini…≠a…Čan kata zaisaŇč, sawzajan, mavan a saŇčasaŇčasan a a éak a ¶…ôma…≠…ôvak aja,
S.FORM: aicu a matjatjalevalevak ta 'iladjan na vusam a kakudakudan namayatucu, a na tja-sevalitan a 'iniladjan kata zaisang, sawzayan, mavan a sangasangasan a aljak a tjemalevak aya,
S.PHON: ai ¶u a ma ¶a ¶a…≠…ôva…≠…ôvak ta Ēi…≠a…Čan na vusam a kakudakudan namajatu ¶u, a na ¶a-s…ôva…≠itan a Ēini…≠a…Čan kata zaisaŇč, sawzajan, mavan a saŇčasaŇčasan a a éak a ¶…ôma…≠…ôvak aja,

S.FORM: ipu u'aljay ipu vavayan, kana sangasangasan a sinipualjak, timadju a tjemalevak a penuljat tua zaisang, sawzayan, ngadan nua uma' kata 'iniladjan i 'inaljan.
S.PHON: ipu u Ēa éaj ipu vavajan, kana saŇčasaŇčasan a sinipua éak, tima…Ču a ¶…ôma…≠…ôvak a p…ônu éat tua zaisaŇč, sawzajan, Ňčadan nua uma Ē kata Ēini…≠a…Čan i Ēina éan.
S.FORM: ipu u'aljay ipu vavayan, kana sangasangasan a sinipualjak, timadju a tjemalevak a penuljat tua zaisang, sawzayan, ngadan nua uma' kata 'iniladjan i 'inaljan.
S.PHON: ipu u Ēa éaj ipu vavajan, kana saŇčasaŇčasan a sinipua éak, tima…Ču a ¶…ôma…≠…ôvak a p…ônu éat tua zaisaŇč, sawzajan, Ňčadan nua uma Ē kata Ēini…≠a…Čan i Ēina éan.

S.FORM: makeljang angata tu aicu a paiwan zuku mamamav a sipacunan tua vavayavayan katua u'alja'aljay, manasika tjuruvuanga a vavayavayan a vusam a na'emiladj i 'inaljan tucu,
S.PHON: mak…ô éaŇč aŇčata tu ai ¶u a paiwan zuku mamamav a sipa ¶unan tua vavajavajan katua u Ēa éa Ēa éaj, manasika ¶uruvuaŇča a vavajavajan a vusam a na Ē…ômi…≠a…Č i Ēina éan tu ¶u,
S.FORM: makeljang angata tu aicu a paiwan zuku mamamav a sipacunan tua vavayavayan katua u'alja'aljay, manasika tjuruvuanga a vavayavayan a vusam a na'emiladj i 'inaljan tucu,
S.PHON: mak…ô éaŇč aŇčata tu ai ¶u a paiwan zuku mamamav a sipa ¶unan tua vavajavajan katua u Ēa éa Ēa éaj, manasika ¶uruvuaŇča a vavajavajan a vusam a na Ē…ômi…≠a…Č i Ēina éan tu ¶u,

S.FORM: makeljang angata tu mamav a sipacunan tua vavayavayan katua u'alja'aljay na paiwan zuku, aicu mavana sikizengezenger nua paiwan zuku a cawcau uta.
S.PHON: mak…ô éaŇč aŇčata tu mamav a sipa ¶unan tua vavajavajan katua u Ēa éa Ēa éaj na paiwan zuku, ai ¶u mavana sikiz…ôŇč…ôz…ôŇč…ôr nua paiwan zuku a ¶aw ¶au uta.
S.FORM: makeljang angata tu mamav a sipacunan tua vavayavayan katua u'alja'aljay na paiwan zuku, aicu mavana sikizengezenger nua paiwan zuku a cawcau uta.
S.PHON: mak…ô éaŇč aŇčata tu mamav a sipa ¶unan tua vavajavajan katua u Ēa éa Ēa éaj na paiwan zuku, ai ¶u mavana sikiz…ôŇč…ôz…ôŇč…ôr nua paiwan zuku a ¶aw ¶au uta.

S.FORM: aicu a seravar namaya paiwan zuku uta, ljakua maljiyan a kakudan niamadju, aicu a seravar semanvusam tua u'aljay, nu neka nu u'aljay a aljak, mana seman vusam ta vavayan a aljak.
S.PHON: ai ¶u a s…ôravar namaja paiwan zuku uta, éakua ma éijan a kakudan niama…Ču, ai ¶u a s…ôravar s…ômanvusam tua u Ēa éaj, nu n…ôka nu u Ēa éaj a a éak, mana s…ôman vusam ta vavajan a a éak.
S.FORM: aicu a seravar namaya paiwan zuku uta, ljakua maljiyan a kakudan niamadju, aicu a seravar semanvusam tua u'aljay, nu neka nu u'aljay a aljak, mana seman vusam ta vavayan a aljak.
S.PHON: ai ¶u a s…ôravar namaja paiwan zuku uta, éakua ma éijan a kakudan niama…Ču, ai ¶u a s…ôravar s…ômanvusam tua u Ēa éaj, nu n…ôka nu u Ēa éaj a a éak, mana s…ôman vusam ta vavajan a a éak.

S.FORM: aicu a nasi na u'aljay kata vavayan tjara izua a patarevan, aicu a sikamamav nua u'aljay nua vavayan a paljavak tua ikacauan a kinemeneman, a kininemeneman, kinasicuay nua paiwan zuku.
S.PHON: ai ¶u a nasi na u Ēa éaj kata vavajan ¶ara izua a patar…ôvan, ai ¶u a sikamamav nua u Ēa éaj nua vavajan a pa éavak tua ika ¶auan a kin…ôm…ôn…ôman, a kinin…ôm…ôn…ôman, kinasi ¶uaj nua paiwan zuku.
S.FORM: aicu a nasi na u'aljay kata vavayan tjara izua a patarevan, aicu a sikamamav nua u'aljay nua vavayan a paljavak tua ikacauan a kinemeneman, a kininemeneman, kinasicuay nua paiwan zuku.
S.PHON: ai ¶u a nasi na u Ēa éaj kata vavajan ¶ara izua a patar…ôvan, ai ¶u a sikamamav nua u Ēa éaj nua vavajan a pa éavak tua ika ¶auan a kin…ôm…ôn…ôman, a kinin…ôm…ôn…ôman, kinasi ¶uaj nua paiwan zuku.

S.FORM: kemasi tua sialangan tua nemanga, maljaluay aza sisan pazangalan ta u'aljay ta vavayan a langalj, katua vecik na djilung, na tjiuma, na kamavanan. kana sinicuayan a vecik izua sakamaya a pa'ecev pa'a'ecev tua vavayan tua u'aljay. kemasi tua sialangan tua nemanga, maljaluay aza sisan pazangalan ta u'aljay ta vavayan a langalj, katua vecik na djilung, na tjiuma, na kamavanan. kana sinicuayan a vecik izua sakamaya a pa'ecev pa'a'ecev tua vavayan tua u'aljay.
S.PHON: k…ômasi tua sia…≠aŇčan tua n…ômaŇča, ma éa…≠uaj aza sisan pazaŇča…≠an ta u Ēa éaj ta vavajan a …≠aŇča é, katua v…ô ¶ik na …Či…≠uŇč, na ¶iuma, na kamavanan. kana sini ¶uajan a v…ô ¶ik izua sakamaja a pa Ē…ô ¶…ôv pa Ēa Ē…ô ¶…ôv tua vavajan tua u Ēa éaj. k…ômasi tua sia…≠aŇčan tua n…ômaŇča, ma éa…≠uaj aza sisan pazaŇča…≠an ta u Ēa éaj ta vavajan a …≠aŇča é, katua v…ô ¶ik na …Či…≠uŇč, na ¶iuma, na kamavanan. kana sini ¶uajan a v…ô ¶ik izua sakamaja a pa Ē…ô ¶…ôv pa Ēa Ē…ô ¶…ôv tua vavajan tua u Ēa éaj.
S.FORM: kemasi tua sialangan tua nemanga, maljaluay aza sisan pazangalan ta u'aljay ta vavayan a langalj, katua vecik na djilung, na tjiuma, na kamavanan. kana sinicuayan a vecik izua sakamaya a pa'ecev pa'a'ecev tua vavayan tua u'aljay. kemasi tua sialangan tua nemanga, maljaluay aza sisan pazangalan ta u'aljay ta vavayan a langalj, katua vecik na djilung, na tjiuma, na kamavanan. kana sinicuayan a vecik izua sakamaya a pa'ecev pa'a'ecev tua vavayan tua u'aljay.
S.PHON: k…ômasi tua sia…≠aŇčan tua n…ômaŇča, ma éa…≠uaj aza sisan pazaŇča…≠an ta u Ēa éaj ta vavajan a …≠aŇča é, katua v…ô ¶ik na …Či…≠uŇč, na ¶iuma, na kamavanan. kana sini ¶uajan a v…ô ¶ik izua sakamaja a pa Ē…ô ¶…ôv pa Ēa Ē…ô ¶…ôv tua vavajan tua u Ēa éaj. k…ômasi tua sia…≠aŇčan tua n…ômaŇča, ma éa…≠uaj aza sisan pazaŇča…≠an ta u Ēa éaj ta vavajan a …≠aŇča é, katua v…ô ¶ik na …Či…≠uŇč, na ¶iuma, na kamavanan. kana sini ¶uajan a v…ô ¶ik izua sakamaja a pa Ē…ô ¶…ôv pa Ēa Ē…ô ¶…ôv tua vavajan tua u Ēa éaj.

S.FORM: a kininemeneman nua paiwan zuku inika amin a 'emuzimuzip na izua u'aljay a vavayan,
S.PHON: a kinin…ôm…ôn…ôman nua paiwan zuku inika amin a Ē…ômuzimuzip na izua u Ēa éaj a vavajan,
S.FORM: a kininemeneman nua paiwan zuku inika amin a 'emuzimuzip na izua u'aljay a vavayan,
S.PHON: a kinin…ôm…ôn…ôman nua paiwan zuku inika amin a Ē…ômuzimuzip na izua u Ēa éaj a vavajan,

S.FORM: aicu a i cemecemel a namezangal tu nemanga izua namasan u'aljay namasan vavayan,
S.PHON: ai ¶u a i ¶…ôm…ô ¶…ôm…ô…≠ a nam…ôzaŇča…≠ tu n…ômaŇča izua namasan u Ēa éaj namasan vavajan,
S.FORM: aicu a i cemecemel a namezangal tu nemanga izua namasan u'aljay namasan vavayan,
S.PHON: ai ¶u a i ¶…ôm…ô ¶…ôm…ô…≠ a nam…ôzaŇča…≠ tu n…ômaŇča izua namasan u Ēa éaj namasan vavajan,

S.FORM: naseminamalji a pa'ulid a puvarungan nua sevalitan na paiwan zuku, mapu'ataitjen a kizenger a mapu'ataitjen a kizenger a mapuljat a paiwan zuku a cawcau,
S.PHON: nas…ôminama éi a pa Ēu…≠id a puvaruŇčan nua s…ôva…≠itan na paiwan zuku, mapu Ēatai ¶…ôn a kiz…ôŇč…ôr a mapu Ēatai ¶…ôn a kiz…ôŇč…ôr a mapu éat a paiwan zuku a ¶aw ¶au,
S.FORM: naseminamalji a pa'ulid a puvarungan nua sevalitan na paiwan zuku, mapu'ataitjen a kizenger a mapu'ataitjen a kizenger a mapuljat a paiwan zuku a cawcau,
S.PHON: nas…ôminama éi a pa Ēu…≠id a puvaruŇčan nua s…ôva…≠itan na paiwan zuku, mapu Ēatai ¶…ôn a kiz…ôŇč…ôr a mapu Ēatai ¶…ôn a kiz…ôŇč…ôr a mapu éat a paiwan zuku a ¶aw ¶au,

S.FORM: satje sanpazangali aicu a tjaljapenapamavan a kakudakudan i tua tja 'inaljan.
S.PHON: sa ¶…ô sanpazaŇča…≠i ai ¶u a ¶a éap…ônapamavan a kakudakudan i tua ¶a Ēina éan.
S.FORM: satje sanpazangali aicu a tjaljapenapamavan a kakudakudan i tua tja 'inaljan.
S.PHON: sa ¶…ô sanpazaŇča…≠i ai ¶u a ¶a éap…ônapamavan a kakudakudan i tua ¶a Ēina éan.
